The '''Resonating Hall''' is where all obtained [[Hero]]es are displayed, along with [[Artifact]]s and [[Equipment]]. [[Hero]]es, [[Artifact]]s, and [[Equipment]] can be upgraded.

==Resonance Level==
[[Hero]]es are not leveled individually. Only the 5 chosen Hands of Resonance are leveled and Resonance Level is equal to the lowest leveled. All other heroes match their level to the Resonance Level.

===Hands of Resonance===
The 5 Hands of Resonance can be changed with any obtained [[Hero]]es at any time. Swapping a Hand of Resonance with a hero of a lower level will swap their levels. Hands of Resonance must be within 10 levels of each other.

===Starter Story===
During the [[Starter Story]], Resonance Level can only be leveled up to Level 240 using {{Item|Gold}}, {{Item|Training Manual||text=Training Manuals}}, and {{Item|Hero Essence|25}}.

==Resonance Synergy==
After reach Resonance Level 240, Resonance Synergy unlocks and requires {{Item|Hero Essence|25}} to level up. {{Item|Training Manual||text=Training Manuals}} can now be recycled into {{Item|Hero Essence|25}} (3000 {{Item|Training Manual||text=Training Manuals}} = 1 {{Item|Hero Essence|25}}). Resonance Synergy increases stats just like Resonance Levels until +60, afterwards there is no effect on combat, and instead provide diamond rewards for increasing its level.

==[[Artifacts]]==
Powerful spells that can be chosen during battle preparation. They can be leveled up to gain new and stronger effects in the Resonance Hall.

==[[Equipment]]==
Gear that can be upgraded up to the average Resonance Level. Equipment corresponds to each [[Class]] and has 6 unique pieces.
